content.content:
1	server:
2	  port: 8080
3	
4	spring:
5	  servlet:
6	    multipart:
7	      max-file-size: 5MB
8	      max-request-size: 5MB
9	  datasource:
10	    url: jdbc:mysql://${MYSQL_HOST:localhost}:${MYSQL_PORT:3306}/${MYSQL_DB:coding_assistant}?useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai
11	    username: ${MYSQL_USER:root}
12	    password: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:12345678}
13	    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
14	  jackson:
15	    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
16	    time-zone: Asia/Shanghai
17	
18	mybatis-plus:
19	  mapper-locations: classpath:mapper/*.xml
20	  configuration:
21	    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
22	  global-config:
23	    db-config:
24	      id-type: auto
25	      logic-delete-field: deleted
26	      logic-delete-value: 1
27	      logic-not-delete-value: 0
28	
29	neo4j:
30	  uri: ${NEO4J_URI:bolt://localhost:7687}
31	  username: ${NEO4J_USER:neo4j}
32	  password: ${NEO4J_PASSWORD:neo4j123456}
33	
34	jwt:
35	  secret: ${JWT_SECRET:mySecretKeyForJWTTokenGenerationThatIsLongEnough2024}
36	  expiration: 86400000
37	
38	llm:
39	  provider: ${LLM_PROVIDER:openai}
40	  openai:
41	    api-key: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:sk-cda6bcc5a5974617b03f38b371a67a7e}
42	    base-url: ${OPENAI_BASE_URL:https://api.deepseek.com}
43	    model: ${OPENAI_MODEL:deepseek-chat}
44	  chatglm:
45	    api-key: ${CHATGLM_API_KEY:}
46	    base-url: ${CHATGLM_BASE_URL:}
47	    model: ${CHATGLM_MODEL:chatglm3-turbo}
48	  qwen:
49	    api-key: ${QWEN_API_KEY:}
50	    base-url: ${QWEN_BASE_URL:}
51	    model: ${QWEN_MODEL:qwen-turbo}
52	
53	file:
54	  upload-dir: ${UPLOAD_DIR:./uploads}
55	
56	logging:
57	  level:
58	    com.coding.assistant: debug
